ciPolicy.default: Default CI must run deterministic bundled-fixture tests and report optional runtime status without failing when optional runtimes are absent.
ciPolicy.requiredCapabilityEnv: Set DICOM_REQUIRE_<CAPABILITY>=1, or DICOM_REQUIRE_OPTIONAL_RUNTIMES=1 for all optional runtimes, to turn an absent optional runtime into a test failure.
ciPolicy.networkSmoke: Set DICOM_INTEROP_SMOKE=1 and DICOM_REQUIRE_NETWORK_INTEROP_SMOKE=1 when CI provisions local Orthanc or dcm4chee smoke endpoints.

capabilities.source: Committed synthetic DICOM Part 10 files under Tests/DicomCoreTests/Fixtures.
capabilities.phiStatus: Synthetic non-PHI. Patient names and identifiers use TEST or PARITY placeholders.
capabilities.expectedMetadata: CT, MR, US, XR, and decoder parity fixtures expose deterministic modality, dimensions, transfer syntax, UIDs, geometry, VOI, rescale, and character-set fields.
capabilities.expectedPixelBehavior: Tiny synthetic images decode deterministically and are safe for default CI.
capabilities.ciBehavior: Required in default CI; absence is treated as a regression, not an optional skip.

capabilities.source: Local non-PHI DICOM files larger than 1 MB placed under Tests/DicomCoreTests/Fixtures.
capabilities.phiStatus: Must be synthetic, public, or fully de-identified non-PHI before use.
capabilities.expectedMetadata: The file must be valid Part 10 DICOM and expose enough metadata for DCMDecoder validity checks.
capabilities.expectedPixelBehavior: Large image fixtures must load without exhausting memory and preserve decoder validity.
capabilities.ciBehavior: Optional by default. Set DICOM_REQUIRE_LARGE_DICOM_FIXTURES=1 when CI installs large non-PHI fixtures.

capabilities.source: Public dcm4che/NEMA JPEG Lossless samples or locally converted non-PHI files placed under Tests/DicomCoreTests/Fixtures/Compressed.
capabilities.phiStatus: Must be public, synthetic, or fully de-identified non-PHI before use.
capabilities.expectedMetadata: TransferSyntaxUID must be 1.2.840.10008.1.2.4.70 or 1.2.840.10008.1.2.4.57, with valid image dimensions and bit-depth tags.
capabilities.expectedPixelBehavior: DCMDecoder must extract JPEG Lossless pixel buffers and expose stable selection-value coverage.
capabilities.ciBehavior: Optional by default. Set DICOM_REQUIRE_JPEG_LOSSLESS_CONFORMANCE_FIXTURES=1 when CI installs these fixtures.

capabilities.source: J2KSwift 11.0.2 linked through SwiftPM; no host installation is required.
capabilities.phiStatus: Package dependency only; qualification uses synthetic pixel buffers and provenance-tracked fixtures.
capabilities.expectedMetadata: Backend status reports package-linked source, version 11.0.2, JPEG 2000 decode, JPEG 2000 and HTJ2K encode, and explicit experimental/fallback verdicts.
capabilities.expectedPixelBehavior: J2KSwift and OpenJPEG cross-decode lossless samples exactly; lossy cases declare a fixture-specific metric; the pinned OpenJPH HTJ2K mismatch remains visible.
capabilities.preflight: DicomCodecCapabilities.backendStatuses() contains the package-linked j2kswift-cpu backend at version 11.0.2
capabilities.ciBehavior: Required in default CI because the dependency is package-linked and deterministic.

capabilities.source: JLSwift 0.9.0 linked through SwiftPM; no host installation is required.
capabilities.phiStatus: Package dependency only; qualification uses synthetic pixel buffers.
capabilities.expectedMetadata: Backend status reports package-linked source, version 0.9.0, JPEG-LS .80/.81 decode and encode, and qualified bit-depth ranges.
capabilities.expectedPixelBehavior: JLSwift and CharLS cross-decode lossless frames bit-exactly and near-lossless frames within the explicit NEAR bound.
capabilities.preflight: DicomCodecCapabilities.backendStatuses() contains the package-linked jlswift backend at version 0.9.0
capabilities.ciBehavior: Required in default CI because the dependency is package-linked and deterministic.

capabilities.source: JXLSwift 1.4.0 linked through SwiftPM; no host installation is required.
capabilities.phiStatus: Package dependency only; qualification uses synthetic pixel buffers.
capabilities.expectedMetadata: Backend status reports package-linked source, version 1.4.0, JPEG XL .110/.111/.112 decode, raster .110/.112 encode, and explicit experimental status; the specialized .111 JPEG bridge is covered separately.
capabilities.expectedPixelBehavior: Qualified 8/16-bit grayscale and RGB8 frames round-trip; JPEG Baseline recompression reconstructs byte-for-byte.
capabilities.preflight: DicomCodecCapabilities.backendStatuses() contains the package-linked jxlswift backend at version 1.4.0
capabilities.ciBehavior: Required in default CI because the dependency is package-linked; clinical use remains disabled by default.

capabilities.source: System CharLS dynamic library resolved by DicomCodecRuntimePreflight. Set DICOM_DECODER_CHARLS_LIBRARY_PATH for a non-standard install.
capabilities.phiStatus: Runtime dependency only; no fixture data.
capabilities.expectedPixelBehavior: JPEG-LS lossless and near-lossless frames round-trip in DicomLosslessCodecTests.
capabilities.ciBehavior: Optional by default. Set DICOM_REQUIRE_CHARLS=1 or DICOM_REQUIRE_OPTIONAL_RUNTIMES=1 when CI provisions CharLS.

capabilities.source: System OpenJPEG dynamic library resolved by DicomCodecRuntimePreflight. Set DICOM_DECODER_OPENJPEG_LIBRARY_PATH for a non-standard install.
capabilities.phiStatus: Runtime dependency only; no fixture data.
capabilities.expectedPixelBehavior: JPEG 2000 16-bit grayscale and JP3D multi-component volume codestreams decode without ImageIO precision loss.
capabilities.ciBehavior: Optional by default. Set DICOM_REQUIRE_OPENJPEG=1 or DICOM_REQUIRE_OPTIONAL_RUNTIMES=1 when CI provisions OpenJPEG.

capabilities.source: opj_compress executable from OpenJPEG, discovered through PATH, /opt/homebrew/bin, or /usr/local/bin.
capabilities.phiStatus: Tool dependency only; generated codestreams use synthetic pixel buffers.
capabilities.expectedPixelBehavior: Synthetic 16-bit PGM/PPM inputs produce deterministic JPEG 2000 codestreams for codec tests.
capabilities.ciBehavior: Optional by default. Set DICOM_REQUIRE_OPJ_COMPRESS=1 when CI provisions opj_compress.

capabilities.source: cjxl and djxl executables from libjxl, discovered through PATH, /opt/homebrew/bin, or /usr/local/bin.
capabilities.phiStatus: Tool dependency only; generated codestreams use synthetic pixel buffers.
capabilities.expectedPixelBehavior: JXLSwift output decodes byte-exactly with djxl, cjxl lossless output decodes byte-exactly with JXLSwift, and JPEG reconstruction is byte-identical.
capabilities.ciBehavior: Optional in quick CI and required by the release gate. Set DICOM_REQUIRE_LIBJXL_TOOLS=1 when provisioning manually.

capabilities.source: Pinned Raster-Lab DICOMKit checkout at commit 9348075fcd7500a1c15c2ff3e6a796f554c066b4 provided through DICOMKIT_CHECKOUT.
capabilities.phiStatus: Only DICOMKit synthetic CLI parity fixtures and DICOM-Swift synthetic non-PHI object fixtures are exchanged.
capabilities.expectedMetadata: DICOMKit level-1 validation and DICOM-Swift validation preserve Part 10, transfer syntax, object family, dimensions, and required geometry metadata.
capabilities.expectedPixelBehavior: DICOMKit synthetic CT and its RLE/JPEG Lossless transcodes decode to the exact stored sample sequence in DICOM-Swift.
capabilities.preflight: dicomtool verifies DICOMKIT_CHECKOUT is a Git checkout at the manifest-pinned commit
capabilities.ciBehavior: Optional in default CI. Set DICOM_REQUIRE_DICOMKIT_INTEROP=1 when CI provisions the pinned checkout.

capabilities.source: Apple Metal device available through MTLCreateSystemDefaultDevice.
capabilities.phiStatus: Runtime dependency only; no fixture data.
capabilities.expectedPixelBehavior: Bundled Metal shader and DCMWindowingProcessor .metal mode match vDSP output within one grayscale value.
capabilities.ciBehavior: Optional by default for CPU-only hosts. Set DICOM_REQUIRE_METAL=1 on Apple GPU CI.

capabilities.source: Local non-PHI Orthanc or dcm4chee endpoints launched by Scripts/interop/run_interop_smoke.sh.
capabilities.phiStatus: Synthetic fixture generated in DicomInteropSmokeTests; no PHI.
capabilities.expectedMetadata: The synthetic patient ID, study UID, series UID, and SOP UID must be discoverable through DICOMweb and DIMSE.
capabilities.expectedPixelBehavior: A one-pixel secondary capture object must store, query, retrieve, and C-MOVE into the local Storage SCP cache.
capabilities.ciBehavior: Skipped unless DICOM_INTEROP_SMOKE=1. Set DICOM_REQUIRE_NETWORK_INTEROP_SMOKE=1 when endpoints are provisioned.

capabilities.source: Apple Network and Security frameworks used by DICOM TLS option and listener tests.
capabilities.phiStatus: Runtime dependency only; TLS test material is generated under temporary directories.
capabilities.ciBehavior: Optional on unsupported platforms. Set DICOM_REQUIRE_NETWORK_SECURITY_TLS=1 when CI is expected to run TLS tests.
